issues.description: Second effect (Trigger with negative PowerBoost to opponent) has no basis in card text. Card only describes a single counter effect with optional trash action.
TrashFromHand should be conditional ("may trash"), not mandatory. The thenActions structure is correct for optional cost, but verify optional cost handling in DSL parser.
Duration should be 'DuringBattle' not 'EndOfBattle'. The boost applies 'during this battle' which is a limited battle scope, not until end of turn.
